title: WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT - 211info
text: GRESHAM RECOVERY CENTER WOMEN’S AND MEN’S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific services for women, including those who are pregnant and parenting, and women involved with child welfare or criminal justice systems. Treatment supports women as they work on parenting in recovery and building and supporting safe and stable families and homes. Access to methadone services available to program participants. 1427 SE 182nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Women age 18 and older; may include patients with cases in child welfare or criminal justice systems. Children may stay with their mothers on site. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 761-6005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Women's Residential Treatment Center (503) 761-6005 Residential (855) 733-2632 Admissions Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 87 Airport Way/181st Services: Perinatal Substance Use Disorder Treatment Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
